edges.note: Tachycardia in appendicitis, especially if perforation
Chills in CMV infection common with fever
Tachycardia during thyrotoxic phase of subacute thyroiditis
Tachycardia in liver abscess with systemic infection
Tachycardia in HSE with systemic infection/seizures
AST/ALT elevation in NMS due to rhabdomyolysis/hepatotoxicity
Pancytopenia/cytopenias can occur in Still (MAS complication)
Cough in Still disease, serositis/pulmonary involvement
Chills in chikungunya common with high fever
Blood culture typically negative in drug fever (key diagnostic clue)
Jaundice in CMV infection with hepatitis, ~10-20%
Hypotension in massive PE with RV failure
Myalgia in acute prostatitis, systemic infection
Liver enzyme elevation in IgG4-RD with hepatobiliary involvement
Chills in Kikuchi disease with fever
AST/ALT elevated in alcohol withdrawal/liver disease
CK elevation from seizures/rhabdomyolysis in DT
Liver enzyme elevation in serotonin syndrome
Chills in measles with high fever
CRP may be mildly elevated in pheo
Fever duration in pheo - episodic over weeks
Cough in leukemia with pneumonia/pulmonary infiltrates
Blast cells/abnormal CBC in leukemia - hallmark
Dyspnea in thyroid storm with heart failure
Crackles in thyroid storm with pulmonary edema
WBC in adrenal crisis - eosinophilia or normal
Cough not typical but can occur
Liver enzymes elevated if hepatic involvement
Mild leukocytosis, no specific CBC pattern
Tachycardia in invasive aspergillosis with sepsis
Procalcitonin can be elevated in IFI
Chills in PMR/GCA with systemic inflammation
Liver enzymes mildly elevated in GCA ~30%
Cough in GCA with large vessel involvement (rare)
Tachycardia in hepatitis A with fever
WBC normal or mildly elevated in hep A
Abdominal pain in lymphoma with bulky abdominal LAD/organomegaly
CBC abnormalities in lymphoma: cytopenias, atypical cells
CBC in liver abscess: leukocytosis, occasionally thrombocytopenia
D-dimer elevated in liver abscess with sepsis/DIC
CXR usually normal in typhoid (distinguishes from pneumonia)
HR in pertussis - usually normal unless severe
CXR in pertussis: perihilar infiltrates or normal
BP in leukemia: normal or hypotension if sepsis/DIC
Hypoxia in leukemia with pulmonary infiltrates/infection

changelog: v3вҶ’v4: 74ж–°з–ҫжӮЈгҒ®иҫәиҝҪеҠ ; v4.1: D62(гӮөгғ«гӮігӮӨгғүгғјгӮ·гӮ№)гҒ«S01,S04иҫәиҝҪеҠ ; v4.2: D53(гғ–гғ«гӮ»гғ©)гҒ«T01,L01,L11,S05,S46,L02иҫәиҝҪеҠ +D67(гғӘгғігғ‘и…«)гҒ«T03иҫәиҝҪеҠ ; v4.3: FATAL8д»¶дҝ®жӯЈ D55/D03/D53/D19/D87/D62/D94/D59гҒ«иЁҲ20иҫәиҝҪеҠ ; v4.4: FATALж®Ӣ4д»¶дҝ®жӯЈ D19 CRPиӘҝж•ҙ+D87гҒ«S05/T01/T03иҫә+D96гҒ«E14/E34/S46/S17/T03иҫә; v4.5: жғ…е ұе№ҫдҪ•еҲҶжһҗгҒ§жӨңеҮәгҒ•гӮҢгҒҹиҫәж¬ жҗҚ7жң¬иҝҪеҠ : D17вҶ’L28/L02, D05вҶ’S06/S07/L28, D55вҶ’T01, D77вҶ’T03; v4.6: ж–°18з—ҮдҫӢеҲҶжһҗгҒ§14иҫәиҝҪеҠ : D16Г—5, D28Г—2, D90Г—2, D19Г—1, D77Г—3, D32Г—1; v4.7: D23(гғӘгӮұгғғгғҒгӮў)9иҫәиҝҪеҠ  T01/S05/S07/S09/E02/E16/E18/L11/L02; v4.8: D103(гғӘгӮҰгғһгғҒзҶұ)14иҫә, D104(гӮӘгӮҰгғ з—…)17иҫәиҝҪеҠ ; v4.9: D97+5иҫә(T03/S17/L22/L01/L16), D23+5иҫә(S14/S12/E34/E14/L01)
